Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether direct care staff believes that the resident is capable of increased independence. -=Not assessed/no information
0=No

254 H0100A_INDWLG_CTHTR_CD H0100A_INDWLG_CTHTR_CD H0100A Bladder and Bowel Appliances: Indwelling Catheter Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident has an indwelling catheter (including suprapubic catheter and nephrostomy tube). -=Not assessed/no
